name: compact-mobile-keyboard
description: Ultra-compact mobile keyboard - all letters in minimal vertical space

scripts.build: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.esm.js --external:react --external:react-dom && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --format=cjs --outfile=dist/index.cjs.js --external:react --external:react-dom && node /usr/local/lib/node_modules/typescript/lib/tsc.js --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist && node scripts/inject-css.js && node scripts/inject-cjs.js
